name: The Southern Company
description: The Southern Company is a leading American energy company headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia, serving millions of customers across the Southeast and beyond. As one of the nation's largest electric and gas utility holding companies, it operates through several subsidiaries, including Alabama Power, Georgia Power, and Mississippi Power. Southern Company is a pioneer in the nuclear energy sector, notably through its operation of the Alvin W. Vogtle Electric Generating Plant, the only new nuclear units built in the United States in over three decades. The company is committed to delivering clean, safe, reliable, and affordable energy while advancing a net-zero future.

investment_theses.company_type: Nuclear Power Generation / Vogtle Plant Operator
